zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wood於1485年出生在英國戴文爾姆斯托可時，她的父親Thomas Wood25歲，母親Denes or Diones25歲。她於1499年與Humphrey de Totehyll在英國戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1584年5月在英國戴文艾可謝特享年99歲，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Wood于1485年出生在英国戴文爾姆斯托可时，她的父亲Thomas Wood25岁，母亲Denes or Diones25岁。她于1499年与Humphrey de Totehyll在英国戴文艾可謝特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1584年5月在英国戴文艾可謝特享年99岁，埋葬在英国戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wood was born in 1485, in Culmstock, Devon, England, her father, Thomas Wood, was 25 and her mother, Denes or Diones, was 25. She married Humphrey de Totehyll in 1499, in Exeter, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died in May 1584, in Exeter, Devon, England, at the age of 99, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wood est née en 1485, à Culmstock, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wood, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Denes or Diones, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey de Totehyll en 1499, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en mai 1584, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 99 ans, et a été enterrée à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Wood 1485 in Culmstock, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wood 25 und ihre Mutter Denes or Diones 25. Sie hat 1499 in Exeter, Devon, England Humphrey de Totehyll geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb im Mai 1584 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Exeter, Devon, England und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wood è nata il nel 1485 nel Culmstock, Devon, England, sua padre, Thomas Wood, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Denes or Diones, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Humphrey de Totehyll nel 1499, nel Exeter, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1584, nel Exeter, Devon, England, all'età di 99 anni, e fu sepolta a Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Woodが1485年にイギリスデボンクウルムストックで生まれた時，父Thomas Woodは25歳，母Denes or Dionesは25歳であった。1499年にイギリスデボンエクセターでHumphrey de Totehyllと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1584年5月にイギリスデボンエクセターで99歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wood(이)가 1485년 영국 데폰 컬스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wood(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Denes or Diones(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 데폰 세터에서 Humphrey de Totehyll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1584년 5월 영국 데폰 세터에서 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wood nasceu em 1485, em Culmstock, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wood, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Denes or Diones, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey de Totehyll em 1499, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em maio de 1584, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, com 99 anos, e foi sepultada em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wood родилась в 1485 г. в местности кулмстокк, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Wood было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Denes or Diones, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey de Totehyll в 1499 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла май 1584 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия в возрасте 99 лет и была похоронена в местности эксетир, девон, Англия.

Murió en mayo de 1584, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 99 años, y fue sepultada en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.
